abstract: Evaluate a workload's performance efficiency against the Well-Architected Performance Efficiency pillar, covering resource selection, scaling, monitoring, and optimization opportunities.
not_for: security posture or IAM review (use security-assessment instead)
cost optimization or spend reduction (use cost-optimization-review instead)
migration planning or 7 Rs (use migration-readiness instead)
reliability or disaster recovery (use reliability-improvement-plan instead)
full cross-pillar WA review (use wa-review instead)
